debug_info.goal:
case left
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
I : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
c : C
⊢ iSupIndep fun p => ↑p c

failed_attempts: exact (PersistenceSubmodule.iSupIndep_iff _).mp (sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep.mp I.sSupIndep) c

intro p
    rw [disjoint_iff, ← PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, ← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply]
    exact (sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep.mp I.sSupIndep p).eq_bot

rw [iSupIndep_iff]
    intro i
    have h := sSupIndep_iff_independent.mp I.sSupIndep i
    rw [disjoint_iff] at h ⊢
    simpa using congr_fun (PersistenceSubmodule.ext_iff.mp h) c

intro i
    have := sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep.mp I.sSupIndep i
    rw [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢
    rw [← this]
    simp

rw [iSupIndep_def]
    intro i
    have := I.sSupIndep' i.2
    rw [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢
    apply_fun (fun p ↦ p.val c) at this
    simpa [PersistenceSubmodule.eval_inf, PersistenceSubmodule.eval_sSup,
      PersistenceSubmodule.eval_bot, iSup_subtype] using this

rw [iSupIndep_iff]
    intro i
    have := I.sSupIndep i.2
    rw [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢
    rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, ← PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply, this, PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply]
    congr 1
    apply le_antisymm
    · apply iSup_le; intro j; apply iSup_le; intro hj
      exact le_sSup ⟨j.2, mt Subtype.eq hj⟩
    · apply sSup_le; rintro p ⟨hp, hp_ne⟩
      exact le_iSup_of_le ⟨p, hp⟩ (le_iSup_of_le (mt (congr_arg Subtype.val) hp_ne) (le_refl _))

intro i
    simp only [disjoint_iff, ← PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply,
      ← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, ← PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply]
    rw [(sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep.mp I.sSupIndep i).eq_bot]

rw [iSupIndep_iff]
    intro p
    have h := I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup_diff p.2
    have : Disjoint (p.val c) ((sSup (I.carrier \ {p.val})) c) := by
      rw [disjoint_iff] at h ⊢
      change (p.val ⊓ sSup (I.carrier \ {p.val})) c = ⊥
      rw [h]; rfl
    apply Disjoint.mono_right _ this
    apply iSup_le; intro q
    apply iSup_le; intro hq
    apply le_sSup
    exact ⟨q.val, ⟨q.property, fun h => hq (Subtype.ext h)⟩, rfl⟩

rw [iSupIndep_iff]
    intro i
    have := I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup i.2
    rw [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢
    have := congr_arg (· c) this
    simpa using this

intro p
    have := sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep.mp I.sSupIndep p
    replace this := congr_arg (fun q ↦ q c) this
    simpa using this

intro i
    have := sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep.mp I.sSupIndep i
    rw [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢
    exact congr_fun (congr_arg (·.val) this) c

intro i
    have := sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep.mp I.sSupIndep i
    rw [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢
    have := congr_arg (fun p ↦ p c) this
    simpa [PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply] using this

rw [iSupIndep_iff]
    intro i
    have := I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup_diff i.2
    rw [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢
    have h_sup : (⨆ (j : I) (h : j ≠ i), j.val c) = ⨆ p ∈ I \ {i.val}, p.val c := by
      apply le_antisymm
      · apply iSup₂_le; rintro ⟨p, hp⟩ hne; exact le_iSup₂ p ⟨hp, hne⟩
      · apply iSup₂_le; rintro p ⟨hp, hne⟩; exact le_iSup₂ ⟨p, hp⟩ hne
    rw [h_sup, ← PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply, ← PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, this.eq_bot, PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply]

intro i
    have := I.sSupIndep.iSupIndep i
    simpa using congr_arg (· c) this

intro p
    have := sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep.mp I.sSupIndep p
    rw [PersistenceSubmodule.disjoint_iff] at this
    simpa only [PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply] using this c

rw [iSupIndep_iff]
    intro i
    have := (sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep.mp I.sSupIndep) i
    rw [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢
    apply_fun (· c) at this
    simpa only [PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply,
      PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply] using this

rw [iSupIndep_iff]
    intro i
    have := I.sSupIndep.iSupIndep_coe i
    simp only [Disjoint, le_bot_iff] at this ⊢
    apply_fun (· c) at this
    simpa only [PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply,
      PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply] using this

rw [iSupIndep_iff]
    intro i
    have := I.sSupIndep i.2
    rw [disjoint_iff, ← PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply] at this
    rw [disjoint_iff, ← this, PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply]
    refine inf_le_inf_left _ ?_
    simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply, sSup_image, iSup_subtype, iSup_and]
    apply iSup_le; intro j
    apply iSup_le; intro hj
    exact le_sSup ⟨j, ⟨j.2, mt Subtype.eq hj⟩, rfl⟩

rw [iSupIndep_iff_disjoint]
    intro i
    have h := I.sSupIndep' i.2
    rw [disjoint_iff] at h ⊢
    rw [← h]
    congr 1
    simp only [sSup_eq_iSup, iSup_subtype, iSup_subtype', Subtype.coe_inj, ne_eq]

rw [iSupIndep_iff]
    intro i
    have := (iSupIndep_iff_sSupIndep Subtype.coe_injective).mpr I.sSupIndep i
    rw [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢
    simp only [← PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, ← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, this,
      PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply]

intro i
    simpa using congr_arg (fun q ↦ q c) (I.sSupIndep i.1 i.2).eq_bot
  · simpa using congr_arg (fun q ↦ q c) I.sSup_eq_top

intro i
    have := I.sSupIndep.iSupIndep Subtype.coe_injective i
    simp only [Disjoint, le_bot_iff] at *
    simpa using congr_arg (· c) this

have h := Set.sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep.mp I.sSupIndep
    intro i
    specialize h i
    rw [disjoint_iff] at h ⊢
    replace h := congr_arg (· c) h
    simpa using h

rw [iSupIndep_iff]
    intro i
    convert Disjoint.map (fun p ↦ p c) (I.sSupIndep i.val i.prop) <;> intros <;> simp

rw [iSupIndep_iff]
    intro i
    have h := sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep.mp I.sSupIndep i
    simp only [Disjoint, le_bot_iff] at h ⊢
    rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, ← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, h,
      PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply]
  · apply pointwise_iSup_eq_top

intro i
    have := sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep.mp I.sSupIndep i
    apply_fun (· c) at this
    simpa using this

rw [iSupIndep_iff]
    intro i
    have h := I.sSupIndep i.2
    rw [disjoint_iff] at h
    apply le_bot_iff.1
    refine le_trans (inf_le_inf_left _ ?_) (le_of_eq (congr_arg (fun p ↦ p c) h))
    apply iSup_le; intro j
    apply iSup_le; intro hj
    exact (le_sSup ⟨j.2, by simpa [Subtype.ext_iff] using hj⟩ : j.val ≤ _) c

intro i
    rw [disjoint_iff, ← PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, ← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply,
      (sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep.mp I.sSupIndep i).eq_bot, PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply]
  · exact pointwise_iSup_eq_top I c

intro i
    have := sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep.mp I.sSupIndep i
    rw [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢
    simpa using this c

rw [iSupIndep_def]
    intro i
    have h := I.sSupIndep i.2
    rw [disjoint_iff] at h ⊢
    apply le_trans _ (h c)
    apply inf_le_inf_left
    simp only [iSup_le_iff]
    intro j hj
    exact le_sSup ⟨j.2, fun h => hj (Subtype.ext h)⟩ c

intro i
    simpa using congr_arg (· c) (sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep.mp I.sSupIndep i)
  · exact I.pointwise_iSup_eq_top c

intro i
    have := I.sSupIndep
    rw [Set.sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep] at this
    apply Disjoint.map (fun p => p c) _ (this i)
    intro a b h
    rw [disjoint_iff] at h ⊢
    rw [← h]
    rfl
